svg.title: Cascade turn processing pipeline
svg.desc: A sequence diagram showing how Cascade processes one voice interaction turn. Audio streams from the browser to Deepgram STT, which fires a speech_final transcript after 300ms silence. The server stamps a turn ID and begins concurrent LLM and TTS processing: the LLM streams tokens which are sentence-chunked and forwarded to TTS using Speak-many then Flush-once over a persistent WebSocket. TTS streams audio frames back to the browser continuously until response_end is sent.
